data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a generic target model, which includes core calendars and plugin/custom subjects. However, the evidence provided does not demonstrate that this requirement is implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case describes a scenario involving dependency rules but does not provide concrete evidence of the generic target model being enforced, indicating a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: Generic target model (core calendars + plugin/custom subjects) is not evidenced as being implemented or enforced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for generic target model implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the implementation of the generic target model.
